title: pelargonium × lineolatum
intro: Pelargonium × lineolatum, also known as Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × lineolatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve cold and flu symptoms, and reduce stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
